message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for storage_targets and watcher_client

- storage_targets (30→37): StorageHealthThresholds/Snapshot strategies,
  StoragePerfProfile default/constrained/high_performance serde roundtrips,
  StorageHealthSnapshot::assess overall tier correctness
- watcher_client (30→37): ClientViewState/ClientSession/ClientSummary strategies,
  serde roundtrips, metadata skip_serializing_if, ClientRole/ViewMode roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
